title: Properties (Data) 📝
description: Give your objects characteristics like names, health, and colors.

slides.title: Adding Details 🎨

quizData.question: What is a 'Property' in OOP?

options.text: A normal variable that lives specifically inside a Class describing its data.

quizData.explanation: Properties (or fields) are simply variables attached to the blueprint.

slides.title: Building the Object 👷‍♂️
The Dot Operator (.) 👇

quizData.question: Fill in the exact character you must type to access an object's properties: p1_health
quizData.explanation: The dot (.) operator digs 'into' the object to find its properties.

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: Notice how each object holds its OWN separate copy of the data!
